hero.welcome_md:
A British astrologer with over 45 years of professional practice. Her work treats astrology as the *sacred language of geometry and consciousness evolution* — birth-chart analyses, online consultations, teaching videos, and regular forecasts on a popular YouTube channel where she covers Pluto in Aquarius, the Saturn-Neptune conjunction at 0° Aries, and the Uranus-Sedna biological-metamorphosis cycle. Pam Gregory Astrology Ltd is registered in the UK; her client practice is based in England.

*The May 2026 Scorpio full-moon forecast is where *plan to be proud*, *focus / one-pointedness as navigation*, and the *observe-at-distance compassion* framing landed in this body's 2026 vocabulary.*

articles.body_md: The May 2026 Scorpio full-moon forecast surfaced a set of framings the body has been navigating from since. Pluto in Aquarius (about to settle for ~20 years) is the power-to-the-people transit — a whole different socio-political system of grassroots communities, lives and businesses getting together, no longer top-down. The Saturn-Neptune conjunction at 0° Aries marks a new era; the Uranus-Sedna cycle carries a biological metamorphosis theme. Pam's practical instructions inside this field — *plan to be proud*, *focus / one-pointedness as navigation*, *observe-at-distance compassion* — are how the body carries the forecast into daily practice.
articles.heading: The 2026 forecast in this body

articles.body_md:
- Pluto in Aquarius as power-to-the-people grassroots cosmology → pairs with [lc-sovereignty-within-oneness](/vision/lc-sovereignty-within-oneness) and [lc-tend-your-flame](/vision/lc-tend-your-flame).
- *Plan to be proud* → pairs with [lc-future-already-shaping](/vision/lc-future-already-shaping) (build as if the form is already what it is becoming; the practical instruction is to choose actions whose future-self will be proud of them).
- Focus / one-pointedness as navigation → pairs with [lc-devotion-placement](/vision/lc-devotion-placement) (where am I actually placed; the body of evidence over words).
- Observe-at-distance compassion → the body's steady practice of holding difficult fields without collapsing into them; resonant with [lc-assemblage-point](/vision/lc-assemblage-point) (move the point; the field reorganises).
articles.heading: What Pam Gregory has given the Coherence Network
